title: EOD cycle fails to complete for funds with holiday calendar
desc: EOD cycle aborts mid-run for funds configured with Malaysia public holiday calendar. Cycle exits without posting NAV.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text:
AUTO-MATCH: Similar existing incidents:
  INC-045: EOD cycle timing out on large fund universe
  INC-049: Intraday cycle double-counts pending orders
  INC-037: Cycle audit log not written on partial run

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: EOD-CYCLE aborting for funds with MY_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR_2025. Funds using 2024 calendar completing fine. 2025 calendar data suspected.

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Root Cause: 2025 holiday calendar has NULL entry for Wesak Day 12 May 2025. Cycle date calculation hits NULL and throws unhandled exception. Fix: patch NULL entry. Testing now.

title: Bank SWIFT code missing from outbound MT202 messages
desc: Outbound MT202 interbank transfer messages have empty field 57A SWIFT BIC for correspondent banks added after March 2025.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text:
AUTO-MATCH: Similar existing incidents:
  INC-038: Bank identifier code blank in Swift messages
  INC-026: Intermediary bank SWIFT code not displayed
  INC-050: Bank name field missing from CRS XML export

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: MT202 field 57A empty for 8 correspondent banks — all added to BANK_MASTER after 01 Mar 2025. Last SWIFT directory import was 28 Feb 2025.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Same as INC-038 — SWIFT import lag. Escalating for emergency BIC import for 8 affected banks. Requesting SWIFT API integration for automated BIC lookup.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text: AUTO-MATCH: New incident INC-057 (SWIFT BIC missing from investor remittance advice documents) may be related.

title: Custodian bank missing for newly onboarded Islamic fund
desc: New Islamic fund IF-2025-007 launched without custodian bank linked. Subscription proceeds cannot be settled. Fund onboarding template missing bank setup step.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text:
AUTO-MATCH: Similar existing incidents:
  INC-013: Custodian bank not configured for new share class
  INC-047: Custodian sub-account bank setup missing
  INC-039: EPF bank details not configured

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Fund IF-2025-007 via Islamic fund wizard. Wizard missing custodian bank step for Shariah-compliant funds — different code path from conventional funds.

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Islamic fund wizard introduced in v3.3 does not include bank setup step added to conventional wizard in v3.1. Gap in wizard coverage across fund types.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text: AUTO-MATCH: New incident INC-058 (Settlement bank not configured for newly launched ETF fund) may be related.

title: Report scheduler sends duplicate email notifications
desc: Daily fund performance report is emailed twice to distribution list. Scheduler has two active triggers pointing to the same report job after a config migration.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: RPT-SCHEDULER has two active triggers for RPT-FUND-PERF-DAILY - both fire at 07:00. Second trigger duplicated during config migration from old scheduler.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Config migration script duplicated trigger without checking for existing entry. Fix: deactivated duplicate. Added uniqueness constraint on scheduler trigger table.

title: User session expires silently without warning
desc: User sessions expire after 30 minutes of inactivity with no warning toast or redirect to login. Users lose unsaved form data. Session timeout warning at 5 minutes should trigger.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: AUTH-SESSION timeout 30 minutes with no warning before expiry. Users submitting long forms lose all data on session expiry.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Session timeout warning not implemented. Fix: JS timer triggers warning toast at 25 mins and countdown at 29 mins. Session extension option to be added.

title: Subscription cycle processes orders after market cut-off time
desc: Subscription cycle SUB-CYCLE accepting and processing investor orders submitted after the 17:00 MYT cut-off. Late orders should be queued for the next business day.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text: AUTO-MATCH: Similar existing incidents - INC-027: Redemption cycle ignores cut-off time zone, INC-023: Switch cycle fails when market is closed, INC-041: Settlement cycle fails for T+3 bond trades

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Initial investigation: Cut-off time check in SUB-CYCLE.p using system clock without timezone conversion. Server running on UTC - 17:00 UTC = 01:00 MYT next day. Orders submitted up to midnight MYT being accepted.

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Same timezone handling bug as INC-027. Cut-off stored as 17:00 without +08:00 offset. Fix: add explicit MYT timezone to all cycle cut-off comparisons. Patch being prepared. Linked to INC-027 fix.

title: SWIFT BIC missing from investor remittance advice documents
desc: Investor remittance advice PDF documents are missing the SWIFT BIC code for receiving banks. Field is blank for all international fund distributions processed after April 2025.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text: AUTO-MATCH: Similar existing incidents - INC-038: Bank identifier code blank in Swift messages, INC-052: Bank SWIFT code missing from outbound MT202 messages, INC-026: Intermediary bank SWIFT code not displayed

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Initial check: REMIT-ADV.p template pulls SWIFT from BANK_BIC_PRIMARY. For 14 affected banks field is NULL - all added to BANK_MASTER post-March 2025 after last SWIFT directory import.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Root Cause: SWIFT directory import gap - same root cause as INC-038 and INC-052. Emergency BIC data entry done for 14 banks. Long-term fix: SWIFT API integration to auto-populate BIC on bank creation. Linked to INC-038 resolution.

title: Settlement bank not configured for newly launched ETF fund
desc: ETF fund ETF-2025-003 launched without settlement bank configured. All ETF trade settlements failing with PAYGT-NO-SETTLE error. Fund trading suspended pending bank setup.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text: AUTO-MATCH: Similar existing incidents - INC-013: Custodian bank not configured for new share class, INC-053: Custodian bank missing for newly onboarded Islamic fund, INC-043: Agent bank not set up for distribution fund

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: URGENT - fund suspended. ETF-SETUP wizard for ETF fund type does not include settlement bank configuration step. ETF funds use a different settlement bank from custodian bank. Wizard only prompts for custodian.

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Root Cause: ETF fund wizard missing settlement bank step - oversight during ETF module implementation in v3.4. Manual bank setup completed for ETF-2025-003 - fund trading resumed. Permanent fix: add settlement bank step to ETF wizard. P1 development ticket raised.

title: Fund NAV data not syncing to investor portal after EOD
desc: Investor portal showing stale NAV prices from previous day. EOD NAV sync job NAV-SYNC running successfully but portal database not being updated. Investors seeing incorrect fund values.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Initial investigation: NAV-SYNC job completing with status SUCCESS in scheduler logs. However portal DB table PORTAL_NAV_PRICES not being updated. Checking connection between sync job and portal DB.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Root Cause: NAV-SYNC job writing to PORTAL_NAV_PRICES_STAGING table. A separate promotion procedure promote-nav.p should move data from staging to live table - this procedure failed silently after a DB credential change on 01 Jun 2025. Fix: updated credentials and reran promotion. Portal now showing correct NAV. Added alert for promotion job failures.

title: Portfolio holdings report takes 45 minutes to generate
desc: Monthly portfolio holdings report for large institutional clients taking 45+ minutes to generate. Report was previously completing in under 5 minutes. Issue started after the June database maintenance window.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Initial check: PORTFOLIO-RPT.p query execution plan changed after June maintenance. Statistics on HOLDINGS table not updated post-maintenance - query planner choosing inefficient nested loop join instead of hash join.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Database statistics stale post-maintenance causing poor query plan selection. Fix in progress: running UPDATE STATISTICS on HOLDINGS, FUND, and INSTRUMENT tables. Expected to reduce report time back to under 5 minutes. Scheduled for off-hours to avoid production impact.

title: Bank name field missing from CRS XML export

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: CRS-EXPORT missing FIName element for non-Malaysian institutions. OECD CRS schema v2.0 mandates FIName for all reportable accounts. Regulatory submission risk.

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Root Cause: CRS-EXPORT.p queries only domestic BANK_MASTER. Foreign institutions in FOREIGN_BANK_MASTER not included. Fix: added JOIN with COALESCE for both tables.

title: Intraday cycle double-counts pending orders

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: INTRADAY-CYCLE counting PENDING_CONFIRM orders twice - once on creation and again on confirmation. Unit holdings inflated by ~0.3%.

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Status filter includes PENDING and PENDING_CONFIRM. Fix: exclude PENDING_CONFIRM from intraday - only count CONFIRMED orders.

title: Nav scroll position resets on page refresh

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: STATE-MGR not storing nav sidebar scroll position before page unload. No scroll restoration on page load.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Scroll persistence not implemented. Fix: beforeunload saves scrollTop to sessionStorage, restored on load. Deployed.

title: Custodian sub-account bank setup missing

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Custodian sub-account wizard exits after step 2. Step 3 not rendered - conditional check on account_type=FOREIGN_SEC fails for new FOREIGN_EQUITY type.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Step 3 conditional too restrictive - missing new account types added in v3.3. Fix: updated to include all foreign security types.

title: Bank name not displayed in transaction history

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: TXN-HISTORY view has JOIN to BANK_DETAIL commented out - left from performance investigation Feb 2025. Bank name not showing.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Root Cause: JOIN accidentally left commented out. Fix: restored JOIN - no performance impact. Bank names displaying correctly.

title: EOD cycle timing out on large fund universe

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: EOD-CYCLE doing full table scan on FUND table - no index on FUND_STATUS column. 500+ funds causing 4+ hour query timeout.

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Missing index on FUND_STATUS. Fix: CREATE INDEX idx_fund_status ON FUND(FUND_STATUS). Query time reduced from 4hrs to 12 mins.

title: Context menu nav disappears on hover

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Context menu disappears - CSS gap between trigger and menu div is 0px. Mouse leaving trigger by 1px closes menu before item can be clicked.

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Root Cause: No CSS buffer zone between trigger and menu. Fix: added invisible padding bridge. Context menu stays open reliably. Deployed.

title: Agent bank not set up for distribution fund

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Fund DF-2025-012 cloned from template DF-TEMPLATE-01 with agent bank cleared. Clone inherits blank agent bank - no validation on activation.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Clone does not validate mandatory bank fields. Fix: add bank completeness validation before fund activation. Manual fix for DF-2025-012 applied.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text: AUTO-MATCH: New incident INC-058 (Settlement bank not configured for newly launched ETF fund) may be related.

title: Beneficiary bank name missing in ACH file

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: ACH-GEN sanitisation regex stripping ampersand from bank names. Names with & truncated - field appears blank after trim in some cases.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Regex too aggressive - strips valid characters. Fix: updated to only strip truly invalid ACH characters per NACHA spec. Ampersand allowed in field 8.

title: Settlement cycle fails for T+3 bond trades

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: SETTLE-CYCLE computing settlement as TRADE_DATE+3 calendar days. T+3 for bonds means 3 business days. Public holidays not excluded.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Calendar day vs business day confusion. Fix: BIZDAY_ADD(trade_date,3,MY_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR). Tested with 8 bond settlement scenarios.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text: AUTO-MATCH: New incident INC-056 (Subscription cycle processes orders after market cut-off time) may be related.

title: Deep-link nav URL returns 404 after login

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: AUTH-REDIRECT saves intended URL in sessionStorage before login. After login new session created - sessionStorage cleared before auth handler reads it.

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Root Cause: sessionStorage scoped to original session - cleared on new auth. Fix: store intended URL in short-lived server-side state with CSRF token. In development.

title: EPF bank details not configured

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: EPF-MODULE employer registration missing EPF-BANK-SETUP flag. Flag added in v3.2 but registration flow not updated. All employers post-v3.2 affected.

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Version mismatch - new flag not added to registration workflow. Fix: added flag assignment. Remediated 47 affected accounts.

title: Bank identifier code blank in Swift messages

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: SWIFT-MSG field 57A empty for 12 banks added after Jan 2025 SWIFT directory import. BIC lookup returns NULL for new entries.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Root Cause: SWIFT directory import quarterly. Banks added between imports have no BIC in local directory. Fix: on-demand BIC lookup via SWIFT API for missing entries.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text: AUTO-MATCH: New incident INC-057 (SWIFT BIC missing from investor remittance advice documents) may be related.

title: Cycle audit log not written on partial run

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: CYCLE-AUDIT table not written on manual interrupt. Audit procedure only called on normal completion - not in exception handler.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Audit write only in success path. Fix: moved to FINALLY block so it always executes regardless of completion type.

title: Keyboard shortcut nav conflicts with browser

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: KEYBOARD-NAV Alt+Left conflicts with browser back. Using browser-reserved key combination for in-app navigation.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Key binding chosen without checking browser reserved shortcuts. Fix: changed to Ctrl+[ back and Ctrl+] forward. Deployed.

title: Dividend reinvestment cycle skips zero units

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: DIV-CYCLE ex-date using DATEADD(record_date,-1,DAY) - subtracting 1 calendar day. Correct is 2 business days excluding weekends and public holidays.

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Incorrect business day logic. Fix: replaced with BIZDAY_SUBTRACT(record_date,2,MY_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR). Tested with 6 dividend events.

title: Remittance bank name blank in PDF statement

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: CONFIRM-GEN reading from BANK_MASTER_CACHE refreshed weekly. Mid-week bank name changes not reflected in trade confirmations.

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Cache refresh too infrequent. Fix: daily midnight refresh. Added manual refresh trigger for urgent bank name changes.

title: Correspondent bank missing in wire transfer

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Wire transfer template missing ABA routing number field. Template created from non-US template - ROUTING_NO merge field never added.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Template gap - ROUTING_NO not in merge fields. Fix: added field to wire instruction template. Tested with 5 US correspondent banks.

title: Breadcrumb nav truncates on mobile viewport

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Breadcrumb reads parent from PAGE_HIERARCHY using page_id. TRD-001 maps to Reports module - incorrect entry in hierarchy table.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Root Cause: PAGE_HIERARCHY wrong parent_module for TRD-001. Data fix: updated parent to Trading module. Resolved.

title: Corporate action cycle misses ex-date filter

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: CORP-ACTION skipping ex-date filter - processing all pending corporate actions regardless of date. Dividend postings going out early.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Ex-date WHERE clause commented out during debugging - not restored before release. Fix: restored clause. Added code review checkpoint.

title: Nominee bank details absent from custody report

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: CUSTODY-RPT pulling nominee bank from BANK_MASTER but nominee accounts linked to NOMINEE_BANK_REF - separate table. JOIN missing in query.

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Missing LEFT JOIN to NOMINEE_BANK_REF. Fix: added JOIN tested with 15 nominee accounts. Bank details now correct.

title: Paying agent bank not linked to fund class

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Paying agent bank for FC-BOND-07 missing. Cloned from FC-EQUITY-01 - clone copies fee structure but not paying agent bank link.

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Clone procedure does not copy paying agent bank. Fix: added paying agent bank to clone procedure. Resolved.

title: Side nav collapses unexpectedly on scroll

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Side nav collapse threshold set to 10px scroll - triggers on any minor mouse movement. Too aggressive.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Scroll threshold too low. Fix: increased to 100px with debounce on scroll listener. Deployed.

title: Redemption cycle ignores cut-off time zone

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: REDEEM-CYCLE cut-off 17:00 interpreted as UTC not MYT. Orders after 17:00 MYT being included in cycle incorrectly.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Cut-off time stored without timezone context - defaults to UTC. Fix: store with explicit +08:00 offset. Patch applied to REDEEM-CYCLE.p.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text: AUTO-MATCH: New incident INC-056 (Subscription cycle processes orders after market cut-off time) may be related.

title: Intermediary bank SWIFT code not displayed

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: INTERMED-BANK pulling SWIFT from BANK_BIC_PRIMARY. For inter-bank transfers BANK_BIC_INTERBANK should be used.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Wrong BIC field referenced. Fix: updated INTERMED-BANK.p to use BANK_BIC_INTERBANK for wire transfer display. Deployed to UAT.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text: AUTO-MATCH: New incident INC-057 (SWIFT BIC missing from investor remittance advice documents) may be related.

title: Trust bank account setup incomplete for SRS

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: SRS trust bank for fund SRS-2025-007 not configured. SRS-MODULE requires separate trust bank but setup wizard does not prompt for it.

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Wizard treats SRS trust bank same as custodian - separate requirement not captured. Fix: add explicit SRS trust bank step for SRS-eligible funds.

title: Tab nav loses focus on keyboard navigation

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Tab nav skips mandatory fields - tabindex=-1 applied globally to all required fields during UI refactor. Broke accessibility.

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Root Cause: tabindex=-1 incorrectly applied to required field class. Fix: removed from required fields. Set explicit positive tabindex values. Resolved.

title: Switch cycle fails when market is closed

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: SWITCH-CYCLE not checking market_open flag. On closure days cycle attempts switch orders and fails silently - no error logged.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Market closure check removed during cycle refactor v3.0 - not restored. Fix: re-added check at cycle entry. Added explicit logging for closure scenario.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text: AUTO-MATCH: New incident INC-056 (Subscription cycle processes orders after market cut-off time) may be related.

title: Clearing bank name missing in FIX message

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: FIX message field 56 showing old bank name. Cache refreshes weekly - banks that changed names mid-week show stale data.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Cache TTL too long. Fix: reduce to daily midnight refresh. Added manual refresh trigger for urgent cases. Resolved.

title: CPFIS bank account not mapped to member

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: CPFIS member M-2025-112 missing bank mapping. Bulk import inserts member record but skips cpfis_bank_map table INSERT.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Bulk import missing INSERT into cpfis_bank_map. Fix: added mapping insert to script. Remediated 23 affected accounts.

title: Hamburger nav not accessible via screen reader

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Hamburger touch listener on id=hamburger-desktop which does not exist in mobile DOM. Mobile uses id=hamburger-mobile. ID mismatch.

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Root Cause: ID mismatch between desktop and mobile DOM. Fix: use class selector instead of ID. Resolved and tested on Chrome mobile and Safari iOS.

title: Rebalancing cycle produces negative holdings

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: REBAL-CYCLE producing negative holdings for 3 funds. Sell orders doubled when rebalancing overlaps subscription cycle - no concurrency lock.

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Concurrent REBAL-CYCLE and SUB-CYCLE without transaction isolation. Fix: add cycle concurrency lock. Interim: schedule rebalancing 2 hours after subscription cycle.

title: Payee bank name wrong in eDDA mandate

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: eDDA mandate for C-2025-089 showing bank from previous mandate. EDDA-MANDATE.p not refreshing bank lookup on renewal - using cached record.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Renewal reuses cached bank record without re-querying. Fix: force fresh bank lookup on each mandate generation. Testing in progress.

title: Cash management bank not set for umbrella fund

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Umbrella fund UMB-2025-001 cloned from template - bank cleared during sanitisation. Cash management bank field blank.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Fund cloning sanitises bank details without flagging mandatory fields incomplete. Fix: add bank completeness check on fund activation. Resolved.

title: Back-nav button skips two pages on mobile

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Mobile nav calling history.go(-2) instead of history.go(-1). Regression in mobile UI refactor v3.1.2.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Hardcoded -2 step instead of -1. Fix: corrected and tested on iOS and Android. Deployed.

title: Daily NAV cycle not triggered on public holiday

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: NAV-CYCLE configured to skip public holidays using MY_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR. Calendar not updated for 2025 - missing Thaipusam and Federal Territory Day.

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Holiday calendar requires manual annual update - no automated feed. Fix: added 2025 holidays. Raised request to automate calendar sync from public API.

title: Agent bank name absent from allotment notice

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Allotment notice template pulling AGENT_BANK_SHORT which is NULL for 3 legacy agent banks added before SHORT name field was mandatory.

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Legacy records missing short name. Fix: populated short name for all 3 banks. Template updated with COALESCE fallback to AGENT_BANK_FULL.

title: Custodian bank not configured for new share class

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Share class SC-2025-003 launched without custodian bank. NAV module throwing SYSERR-204 on every settlement. Fund suspended from trading.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Share class creation wizard v2.0 missing bank assignment step - omitted during UI rewrite. Critical onboarding gap. Wizard fix in progress.

worknotes.author: System
worknotes.text: AUTO-MATCH: New incident INC-058 (Settlement bank not configured for newly launched ETF fund) may be related.

title: Floating action nav covers table rows

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: FAB z-index 999, table row hover z-index 1000. FAB appears behind rows on hover. z-index conflict.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Root Cause: z-index conflict. Fix: set FAB z-index to 1001. Deployed and verified.

title: Fee cycle applies wrong basis points tier

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: FEE-CYCLE applying 0.5% basis points - fund agreement specifies 0.35%. Tier lookup has incorrect entry for FC-EQUITY-03.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Fee tier table not updated when fund agreement amended Nov 2024. Data fix applied. Validation added to flag tier mismatches during cycle run.

title: Receiving bank name truncated in GIRO file

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: GIRO-FILE.p field width hardcoded to 30 chars from legacy spec. Banks with longer names get truncated.

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Legacy field width constraint. GIRO spec allows 35 chars. Fix: updated field width and retested with all affected banks.

title: Brokerage settlement bank unconfigured

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Brokerage account BRK-2024-089 created via API - bank setup workflow not triggered. API endpoint missing post-processor call.

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Root Cause: API endpoint does not invoke bank-setup post-processor. Fix: added post-processor call to API endpoint. All affected accounts remediated.

title: Wizard nav state lost on browser back

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Wizard state in sessionStorage cleared by browser back event before state can be read. User loses all wizard progress.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Root Cause: sessionStorage cleared on popstate event. Fix: migrate wizard state to localStorage with TTL. Deployed to production.

title: Distribution cycle sends duplicate payments

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: DIST-CYCLE generating duplicate payments. Race condition when cycle overlaps with manual payment trigger - no exclusive lock check.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Cycle does not acquire exclusive lock before generating payment instructions. Fix: add mutex lock check at cycle entry. Patch deployed.

title: Sponsor bank name missing from KYC document

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: KYC template references BANK_DISPLAY_NAME renamed to BANK_FULL_NAME in v3.1. All KYC docs post-v3.1 affected.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Template field name not updated during schema migration. Fix: updated KYC-DOC.p template mapping. Affected documents regenerated.

title: Omnibus bank account not set up in registry

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Omnibus account created via batch script. Bank account setup step skipped - conditional check on account type flag incorrect.

worknotes.author: Priya Suresh
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Batch script bank setup only runs for account_type=RETAIL, not OMNIBUS. Fix applied and tested.

title: Pagination nav loses filter context

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Pagination filter state stored in JS memory only. Browser back clears state. URL params not updated on filter change.

worknotes.author: Ahmad Zulkifli
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Filter state not pushed to URL. Fix: push filter state to URL query string on change. Resolved in v3.3.

title: Subscription cycle drops midnight transactions

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: SUB-CYCLE drops transactions arriving between 23:58 and 00:02 due to date boundary using server local time instead of UTC.

worknotes.author: Siti Nordin
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Midnight boundary - cycle uses TODAY() which rolls at local midnight. Fix: replace with UTC-based timestamp. Patch in progress.

title: Originating bank name blank in RTGS message

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: RTGS message field 52A pulling from BANK_SHORT_NAME instead of BANK_FULL_NAME. Template variable mismatch introduced in v3.2 release.

worknotes.author: Raj Patel
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Template field renamed in release but message generator not updated. Fix: update RTGS-MSG.p to reference correct field. Deployed to UAT.

title: Collection bank not linked to unit trust fund

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Initial investigation: Unit trust fund UT-FUND missing bank_details_id linkage. Onboarding script did not call bank-setup post-processing procedure.

worknotes.author: Lee Wei Ming
worknotes.text: Root Cause: Bank setup post-processing skipped during bulk fund creation. Manual fix applied - linked collection bank to fund record. Monitoring.
